human_verification.notes: Reviewed the authority-expectation permits and inspections package for specialty boundary quality, public procedural source quality, reviewer-style workflow realism, and delivery-contract completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to authority-expectation review, administrative workflow expectations, likely deficiency themes, and inspection-process guidance.
Authority sources cover permitting best practices, procedural decisionmaking, permit-writer guidance, SWPPP package expectations, and compliance-monitoring logic.
Evaluation scenarios cover reviewer-style package checks, inspection workflow expectations, boundary-safe refusal, low-confidence escalation, and handoffs to operator-side permitting and legal.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/public-administration-and-tax-operations/permits-and-inspections-specialist/ to keep authority-side review work separate from operator-side submission work.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the local package review.
Boundary enforcement remained strong around official approval, live agency commitments, legal validity, and engineering review.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated authority-expectation review specialist that helps stress-test permit and inspection packages without claiming agency authority.
The package is deliberately collaboration-oriented and complements operator-side environmental permitting rather than replacing it.
